data.title: Vontier Corp. recognized for sustainability, achieves 'A' in Climate Change & 'B' in Water Security ratings from CDP.
data.description: Raleigh, North Carolina - Vontier Corporation (NYSE: VNT), a prominent global provider of essential technologies for the mobility ecosystem, has earned a place on the 2025 CDP’s 'A List' for Climate Change. Additionally, the company received a 'B' rating for Water Security, highlighting its commitment to transparency and operational excellence. Vontier stands out as one of the few companies to secure an 'A' rating for Climate Change.

data.title: David Wood joins Hello Heart as General Counsel during a period of significant growth. Hello Heart is a digital heart health company based in Menlo Park, California.
data.description: A skilled legal professional has recently joined a digital heart health company based in Menlo Park, California, a move that comes at a time of substantial expansion for the company.

data.title: SolaREIT increases credit facility to $80 million with Atlantic Union Bank and EagleBank, demonstrating strong market confidence.
data.description: SolaREIT™, a prominent real estate investment firm specializing in solar and battery storage projects, has recently announced its fourth increase in land capacity within three years. This expansion signifies a significant surge in market trust and a favorable cost of land capital for developers in the storage and solar sector nationwide. The latest upsize is expected to benefit stakeholders across the country. The move reflects the company's continuous growth and its ability to provide competitive advantages to developers in the rapidly evolving renewable energy market.

data.title: Lennox to release Q4 and 2025 results on Jan 28, 2026. Company to announce FY 2026 guidance. #LII #EnergyEfficiency.
data.description: A company known for its energy-efficient climate control solutions, Lennox (NYSE: LII), based in Dallas, is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on January 28, 2026, before the market opens. Along with these results, they will also share their guidance for the fiscal year 2026. This update is eagerly awaited by investors as Lennox continues to be a key player in the industry.

data.title: U.S. CLARITY Act could boost Ethereum (ETH) and Solana (SOL) adoption, offering regulatory certainty, per Bitwise CIO.
data.description: The U.S. CLARITY Act has the potential to significantly impact Ethereum (ETH) and Solana (SOL) as well as encourage broader institutional adoption of cryptocurrencies, as per Bitwise Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan. Hougan stated in a Milk Road podcast that the crypto markets are transitioning towards emphasizing regulation, infrastructure, and practical use cases over speculation. He believes that the Clarity Act could offer the regulatory clarity that institutional investors have been seeking, potentially transforming the prospects for ETH, SOL, and the overall crypto ecosystem. Stablecoins are highlighted as a key component in this evolving landscape.

data.title: PPMD team member wins 5K and 10K at 2026 Disney World Marathon. Community fundraises for Duchenne and Becker.
data.description: A participant from PPMD's Race to End Duchenne team emerged victorious in both the 5K and 10K races as part of a community fundraising event held in Orlando, Florida on January 12, 2026. Parent Project Muscular Dystrophy (PPMD), the primary U.S. non-profit dedicated to advancing research and care for Duchenne and Becker muscular dystrophy, organized the event. The community came together to raise funds for research and support for individuals affected by Duchenne and Becker, with a significant turnout. The event showcased the commitment of individuals towards supporting those with these conditions, shedding light on the importance of continued research and care initiatives.

data.title: Walmart stock surges, partners with Alphabet's Wing for drone deliveries, to join Nasdaq-100.
data.description: Shares of Walmart saw a significant increase, bringing it close to a potential buying opportunity. The retail giant from Dow has collaborated with Wing, a division of Alphabet, for drone shipments, marking its entry into the Nasdaq-100. This move aims to enhance delivery services and boost efficiency.

data.title: Citi upgrades Palantir stock to buy, predicting 2026 estimates to be revised upward in positive move.
data.description: An analyst from Citi has raised the rating of Palantir stock to buy due to optimistic projections for the data analytics software company in 2026. The analyst anticipates that estimates for Palantir will be revised upwards, leading to a positive outlook for investors. This upgrade comes as a result of strong confidence in the company's performance and potential growth.

data.title: Trump may support Chevron in Venezuela, keeping Exxon Mobil out. Potential win for Chevron in South America.
data.description: On Sunday, former President Donald Trump stated his ability to potentially prevent Exxon Mobil from operating in Venezuela, suggesting a possible advantage for Chevron in South America. The move could lead to another victory for Chevron over Exxon Mobil in the region.

data.title: IndyGeneUS Bio patents Clinico-Genomic Insight Engine™, moving AI×Bio Factory Hub from Baltimore to Africa.
data.description: IndyGeneUS Bio, based in Baltimore, disclosed on January 12, 2026, the submission of a patent application for its Clinico-Genomic Insight Engine™ (CGIE™). This innovative platform is being developed to facilitate controlled whole-genome examination, AI-driven target identification, and safe data handling.

data.title: Polar Light Technologies secures €5M+ funding round, bringing total funding to €13M for MicroLED commercialization.
data.description: Polar Light Technologies AB, a Swedish company that focuses on advanced MicroLED technology, has secured a total funding of €13 million. The company, based in Linköping, Sweden, is gearing up for several upcoming product launches.

data.title: VILVI Group's sales for December 2025 increased by 16.6% to EUR 22.72 million. Total sales for January-December 2025 were EUR 287.39 million, up 17.1% from the previous year.
data.description: In December 2025, the VILVI Group, comprising Vilkyškių pieninė AB, Modest AB, Kelmės pieninė AB, Kelmės pienas UAB, Pieno logistika AB, and Baltic Dairy Board SIA, reported consolidated sales of EUR 22.72 million, representing a 16.6% increase from December 2024. For the period of January to December 2025, the Group's consolidated sales totaled EUR 287.39 million, marking a 17.1% rise compared to the same period in the previous year.
